Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2020 Continued To Jul-20-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret O'Dowd, Esq., court-appointed counsel for the minor, Artemis Stahl [but only in the related guardianship case] - by telephone.

[heard with related case PGN-17-300988]

The Court notes the absence of Lexie Tillotson, the Guardian of the minor and briefly questions Ms. O'Dowd as to the status of the guardianship [and of the estate, to the extent she has any knowledge of the same]. After discussion, the Court orders the issuance of an Order to Appear to Lexie Tillotson to appear on July 20, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear at hearing on July 6, 2020 and failed to provide additional and supplemental information requested by the examiner. This Hearing and the hearing on the status of the estate are continued to July 20, 2020 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)
